title: DNaseI and Flowcell Clearing for Long Read Yields and Multi-Sample Sequencing
author: John Tyson
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7eqhjdw

steps.title: Mix together 200 µL FB +...
steps.instruction: Mix together 200 µL FB + 2 µL 100 millimolar (mM) CaCl 2 + 2 µL DNaseI (2U per ul) to form DNaseI flowcell digestion buffer

steps.title: Add 200ul of DNaseI Digestion buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 200ul of DNaseI Digestion buffer to the flowcell through the sample port and close

steps.title: Incubate for 20mins to 2hrs depending...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 20mins to 2hrs depending on sample, monitoring the Single Pore : Strand numbers reported in MinKNOW

steps.title: Flush flowcell by adding 400ul of...
steps.instruction: Flush flowcell by adding 400ul of FB buffer through the Sample Port

steps.title: Add 500ul of FB + Tether...
steps.instruction: Add 500ul of FB + Tether to the flowcell through the Sample Port

steps.title: Close Sample Port and Incubate for 5 mins
steps.instruction: Close Sample Port and Incubate for 5 mins

steps.title: Open Sample Port and remove any air
steps.instruction: Open Sample Port and remove any air. Open SpotOn port and prime by addition of a small volume of FB + Tether through the Sample Port.

steps.title: Start MinKNOW and monitor Single Pore
steps.instruction: Start MinKNOW and monitor Single Pore : Strand numbers

steps.title: Open Sample Port and remove any...
steps.instruction: Open Sample Port and remove any air as usually done when first using a flowcell

steps.title: Once strand pore count has dropped...
steps.instruction: Once strand pore count has dropped to desired level stop MinKNOW

steps.title: Open Open Sample Port and remove any air
steps.instruction: Open Open Sample Port and remove any air

steps.title: Add 75ul freshly prepared library (DNA...
steps.instruction: Add 75ul freshly prepared library (DNA + SQB + LLB (optional)) by spotting onto the SpotON port. Once library has enetered the flowcell close first the SpotON Port followed by the Sample Port.

steps.title: Now ready to Start the sequencing run in MinKNOW
steps.instruction: Now ready to Start the sequencing run in MinKNOW
